markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content drafts and align on structural and editorial changes.](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Flexible Tables:** The "Pricing Snapshot" will use flexible Webflow CMS tables to accommodate variable data structures (e.g., Perplexity's 7 columns vs. DeepSeek's 4), avoiding a restrictive, standardized format.](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**Refined Content:** The "Key Features" section will be a summary paragraph of pricing-relevant features, and the "Customer Sentiment" section will remove negative "complaints" to avoid alienating potential customers.](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
  - [**Stronger POV:** The "Metronome's Take" section will be rewritten to provide a more distinct, expert perspective, moving beyond a simple summary of news.](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)
  - [**Complex Models:** For companies with multiple models (e.g., Base 10), Growth X will first assess the prevalence of this structure across the top 100 companies before defining a standard approach.](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)

## Topics

### Page Structure & Table Standardization

  - [**Problem:** Inconsistent table structures across company pages (e.g., Perplexity has 7 columns, DeepSeek has 4) create a poor user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [**Solution:** Use flexible Webflow CMS tables that adapt to each company's specific data.](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This avoids a restrictive, standardized format that would force the removal of valuable, company-specific pricing details.](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
      - [**Implementation:** Growth X requires raw code/markdown input access in the Webflow CMS (not a rich text editor) to automate table generation and ensure proper formatting.](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)

### Content Refinements

  - [**"Key Features" Section:**](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
      - [**Problem:** The current bulleted list is too long and includes irrelevant, fast-changing details (e.g., enterprise security) that aren't core to pricing.](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
      - [**Solution:** Replace the list with a summary paragraph focused on 4–5 key features directly relevant to the company's pricing model.](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
  - [**"Customer Sentiment" Section:**](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
      - [**Problem:** Including negative "complaints" creates a risk of alienating potential customers who may also be customers of the reviewed company.](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
      - [**Solution:** Remove the "complaints" section entirely.](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
      - [**Refinement:** Ensure remaining positive quotes are directly related to the pricing model (e.g., clarity, value) and not just general product praise.](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)

### "Metronome's Take" Section

  - [**Problem:** The current content is a generic summary of news, lacking a distinct, expert perspective from Metronome.](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)
  - [**Solution:** Will Watters will rewrite this section to provide a stronger, more impactful Metronome POV.](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)
      - [**V1 Goal:** A simplified, high-level perspective.](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)
      - [**Future Vision (V2):** Evolve into a deeper analysis that maps the company's pricing to Metronome's best practices, potentially including a "deploy to sandbox" CTA.](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)

### Handling Complex Pricing Models (e.g., Base 10)

  - [**Problem:** Companies like Base 10 offer multiple distinct models (e.g., GLM 4.6, Quen, Gini) with separate pricing on a single page, which breaks the standard page structure.](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [**Approach:**](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
    1.  [**Assess Prevalence:** Growth X will first identify how many of the top 100 companies use this multi-model structure.](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
    2.  **Define Strategy:**
          - [If rare → Use custom solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
          - [If common → Develop a standardized template (e.g., a dedicated section with a table for each model).](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
    3.  [**V1 Action:** Growth X will create a first draft for Base 10 to test a potential structure.](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Will Watters:**](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1733.0)
      - [Add comments to the Perplexity doc detailing the agreed-upon structural and editorial changes.](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1733.0)
      - [Draft new "Metronome's Take" content for review by Megan LaFlamme and CK.](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)
  - [**Growth X:**](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
      - [Assess the prevalence of multi-model pricing structures across the top 100 companies.](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
      - [Create a V1 draft for Base 10 to test a potential structure for complex models.](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
      - [Grant Katia access to project tools; Katia will become the new day-to-day lead.](https://fathom.video/share/bfWqfGHrhCKJw47VUKNRTL6wYnppyZNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1893.0)
